summary: The Spark 4.1 support PR has two blocking issues: duplicate class compilation failure in the new module due to overlapping source files with the base shared code, and a missing enforcer rule for spark-sql_2.13:4.1.0 in the parent POM. Additionally, the .gitignore change should be in a separate commit. The core approach for import-path overrides is correct but these issues must be resolved.

findings.title: Duplicate class definitions will fail Scala compilation
findings.description: The build-helper-maven-plugin adds both azure-cosmos-spark_3/src/main/scala and the module's own src/main/scala as source roots. Three files (ChangeFeedInitialOffsetWriter, CosmosCatalogBase, CosmosCatalogITestBase) exist in both directories with identical package/class names. The Scala compiler will produce duplicate class errors.
findings.suggestion: Either (a) configure source exclusions in the scala-maven-plugin for these 3 files, (b) use a maven-antrun-plugin step to copy shared sources to target/ with the 3 conflicting files excluded, or (c) extract HDFSMetadataLog usage into a small bridge/factory object so the large base files can stay shared.

findings.title: Missing enforcer rule for spark-sql_2.13:4.1.0
findings.description: The parent POM's bannedDependencies whitelist includes spark-sql_2.13:[4.0.0] but has no entry for [4.1.0]. The Maven enforcer plugin will reject the 4-1 module's dependency.
findings.suggestion: Add the following line after line 325: <include>org.apache.spark:spark-sql_2.13:[4.1.0]</include><!-- {x-include-update;cosmos-spark_4-1_org.apache.spark:spark-sql_2.13;external_dependency} -->

findings.title: .gitignore change is unrelated to Spark 4.1
findings.description: Adding .coding-harness/ is infrastructure for the coding agent and unrelated to this feature. Should be a separate commit.
findings.suggestion: Move the .gitignore change to a separate commit.

findings.title: CHANGELOG mixes inherited fixes with initial release
findings.description: The changelog lists bug fixes (deadlock PR 48689, MetadataVersionUtil PR 48837) that were originally for existing modules. Since this is a brand-new initial release, consider noting inherited fixes differently.
findings.suggestion: Note 'Includes all fixes from azure-cosmos-spark_4-0_2-13 v4.47.0' rather than listing them as this module's fixes.

findings.title: 1,792 lines of code duplicated for 1-line import changes
findings.description: Three files (ChangeFeedInitialOffsetWriter.scala: 92 lines, CosmosCatalogBase.scala: 727 lines, CosmosCatalogITestBase.scala: 973 lines) differ from shared counterparts by exactly one import line (streaming.HDFSMetadataLog → streaming.checkpointing.HDFSMetadataLog). This creates significant maintenance burden.
findings.suggestion: Consider a bridge pattern to abstract the import difference.

findings.title: Pre-existing test file naming typo
findings.description: Test file should be named RowSerializerPoolTest.scala. Present in 4-0 too; not introduced here.
findings.suggestion: Not a blocker for this PR, but worth fixing in a future cleanup commit.

findings.title: CI, versioning, and POM structure are correct
findings.description: CI triggers, release parameters, artifact entries, version_client.txt, external_dependencies.txt, and sdk/cosmos/pom.xml module listing all follow established patterns. The 12 non-overridden source files and 6 non-overridden test files are byte-identical to their 4-0 counterparts.

findings.title: Spark 4.1.0 availability
findings.description: Ensure org.apache.spark:spark-sql_2.13:4.1.0 is published to Maven Central before CI runs. The test profile activation guard should prevent build failures in default builds.
findings.suggestion: Verify Maven Central availability before merging.
